title: Backwards Library
description: Backports template models and provides item redirection for ID changed items - Intended to make supporting older versions easier
body:
## Overview

**This is a pack that backports template models (`cube*.json`, `*template*.json`) and provide item redirections for ID changed items (like `scute` to `turtle_scute` and `grass_path` to `dirt_path`)**

**This resource pack has been made to make supporting older versions of Minecraft easier!**


![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rGLMJzPP/images/91e0fc8b944c211e182739eb9d4536f9a81af221.png)


# Documentation
### Template Model Backporting
Every model that has `cube` or `template` in it is backported, except if their parent is `builtin/entity`.

### Item Redirections
If an item's ID had been changed, a redirection will be made in the following way.

```json
{
  "parent": "<insert new location here>"
}
```
*`old_location.json`*

This makes it so it copies over every information from the new model into the old one, including the texture.
